manual_prerequisites: Configure real reviewer_database_ids and/or team_database_ids without guessing GitHub identities.
Add the corresponding independent eligible code owner or team to every privileged CODEOWNERS route.
Apply the confirmation-bound default-branch ruleset with two approvals, code-owner review, stale-review dismissal, and last-push approval.

Create the protected privileged-review environment with at least two configured independent reviewers, prevent-self-review, no admin bypass, and only protected branches; scope the verifier App credentials to that environment.
Obtain at least two distinct current non-author CODEOWNER approvals for the exact last-pushed protected tree.

For every activation or renewal, replace both activation_request_id with a fresh UUIDv4 and activation_nonce with fresh 32-byte lowercase hex before review; never reuse either value from the base anchor.

Collect the exact merged live PR/review/ruleset/environment evidence in the protected default-branch workflow, sign it offline with a trusted predecessor key, and package only the freshly live-verified envelope.
Renew the durable signed review snapshot before its 400-day supported-release lifetime expires or before the release reaches end of support.
